claims.summary: Verify that emotional marker lanes and projected semantic lanes remain independently observable in the 48D codec.
Run Astrid-authored high-entropy embedding pairs and compare 8D projection nuance with legacy warmth retention.
Run a high-arousal sequence through clamp provenance and test whether distinct inputs flat-top into indistinguishable outputs.
Verify that narrative evidence is not limited to a first-half/second-half shift and already includes four-point arcs, curvature, and dynamics.
Any density-gradient-dependent FEATURE_ABS_MAX or live codec scaling change remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
